title: Schmucks!
description: Adds little people that can do the heavy lifting for you!
body:
![Schmucks!](https://i.imgur.com/3yTxMZD.png) Adds helpful "Schmucks" that will always stay loyal! Incredibly useful for early game. # Description Schmucks are basically like wolves but craftable - as well as having a few nice bells and whistles.

Schmucks will pick up any items that it can, and put them into chests if it does not want the item. When they pick up an item they do want, however, they can do one of several things: - By default, the Schmuck will treat the item as if it was a melee weapon. - However, if the item is a bow or egg (yes, an egg) it will treat it as a ranged weapon, shooting projectiles like a skeleton. - As well, the Schmuck will use pickaxes to mine any exposed ore nearby. - If the item is food or an ore, the Schmuck will try to find a nearby whitelisted furnace or any farmland to put it into/onto. - If they don't want an item, they'll try to find a whitelisted chest to put it into. # Crafting ## Pure Magic It's pure freakin' magic! It is primarily used as a crafting material for other recipes.

![Crafting Pure Magic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rwilliaise/schmucks/master/.github/img/pure_magic.png) ## Schmuck It's you! Literally you!

![Crafting a Schmuck](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rwilliaise/schmucks/master/.github/img/schmuck.png) ## Schmuck Staff Basically a remote for your Schmucks. Allows you to control the Schmucks if you right click on one, or control all of your Schmucks if you shift right-click in the air. Also, shift right-clicking grass/dirt, chest, or a furnace will add it to your nearby Schmucks whitelist.

![Crafting a Schmuck](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rwilliaise/schmucks/master/.github/img/control_wand.png)
